stateReason: The owner-admitted scheduled RunOnce inbox reliability lane is implemented on its review branch and remains in progress until review and merge.

workItems.title: Deterministic scheduled RunOnce inbox sweep
workItems.goal: Replace replay-prone ambient _stack inbox processing with one scheduled, bounded, claim-safe, correlated RunOnce sweep.
acceptanceCriteria: The stable current-user task performs exactly one sweep and exits.
Freshness, ownership, atomic claim, overlap, crash recovery, Contracts v2 correlation, and terminal replay rejection are proven.
The exact stale April prompt is quarantined without execution and the final task is Ready with result 0.
